title: Magikarp Jump Pack [Cobblemon]
description: A datapack that adds Magikarp Jump variants to Cobblemon!
body:
# Magikarp Jump Pack! 

### ![logo](https://i.imgur.com/5Hqc42Q.png) For [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)! ![logo](https://i.imgur.com/5Hqc42Q.png)

![magikarp examples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GYuVuzYp/images/29eed3c09c2f1bfcef154458819301e89668dc78.png)

This resource pack adds **31 variants** from the game Magikarp Jump for Magikarp, Gyarados, and their shiny forms (for a total of ***124 new texture variants***)!

## Installation

***Method 1:***

Put `Magikarp_Jump_Assets_vX.X` in your resourcepacks folder and `Magikarp_Jump_Datapack_vX.X` in your world's datapacks folder.

***Method 2:***

Put `Magikarp_Jump_vX.X` in both your resourcepacks folder and your save's datapacks folder.
### Spawning

Magikarp Jump variants will spawn submerged in non-aquatic biomes. This means small ponds in primarily terrestrial areas (not rivers/oceans/etc!). Be sure to search high and low!

For now, you can spawn them with the following command: `/pokespawn magikarp jump={{choice}}`, simply change `{{choice}}` to any one in the list you'd wish to see. Shiny variants can also be spawned by simply adding `shiny` to the end of your command.

![gyarados](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GYuVuzYp/images/30fc2052c76629b44e4fc91c5c6538fde5d0394b.png)


###### Credits
<sub>I would like to extend many thanks to [Nub](https://modrinth.com/user/NubBunBun) for doing the original work on Magikarp and Gyarados as well as [Veraxiel](https://modrinth.com/user/Veraxiel) for doing very tedious texture-patching work after a model change broke the pack. Thanks!!!</sub>
